text:
(a) A director serves a two-year term.

(b) An initial director serves a term ending on the second anniversary of the date:

(1) the latest concurrent order creating or re-creating the district under Section 172.052 (Creation of District by More than One County) was adopted; or

(2) an order creating the district under Section 172.053 (Creation of District by One County) was adopted.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 172. Rural Rail Transp. Districts
##### § 172.102 — Terms

(a) A director serves a two-year term.

(b) An initial director serves a term ending on the second anniversary of the date:

    (1) the latest concurrent order creating or re-creating the district under Section 172.052 (Creation of District by More than One County) was adopted; or

    (2) an order creating the district under Section 172.053 (Creation of District by One County) was adopted.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A director serves a two-year term.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An initial director serves a term ending on the second anniversary of the date:
the latest concurrent order creating or re-creating the district under Section 172.052 (Creation of District by More than One County) was adopted; or
an order creating the district under Section 172.053 (Creation of District by One County) was adopted.
